description_long: This storage locker is a rectangular structure with a brick-patterned exterior and a flat, solid white roof. The front side features three large, white doors with simple round handles, likely for accessing separate storage compartments. One side is entirely brick-patterned with no openings, while the opposite side has a single window and a smaller door, suggesting additional access or ventilation. The roof includes a rectangular vent or skylight, providing some airflow or light to the interior. The overall construction appears robust, suitable for outdoor use, and the design is utilitarian with minimal decorative elements. The locker is large enough to store bulky items and is likely intended for secure, weather-resistant storage in public or semi-public urban environments.
description: A large, brick-patterned storage locker with multiple white doors, a flat white roof, and a small window. Designed for secure, weather-resistant storage in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing three large white doors with round handles set in a brick-patterned wall.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a solid brick-patterned wall with no openings or features.
description_view_2: Rear view with a small window and a single white door, both set in the brick-patterned wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a plain brick-patterned wall with no doors or windows.
